market_pulse: Competitors showing strong pre-weekend momentum with major DJ headliners (Steve Aoki, Lavern Music, Duke Dumont) while EDC momentum carries momentum into June with established artist residencies and dayclub activity ramping.

weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Monitor competitor story activity Saturday evening; consider flash announcement of weekend performers if not already posted. David Guetta residency at LIV Beach created strong precedent—leverage that memory in retargeting.

content_gaps.description: Latin house and tropical-inspired mixes gaining traction at competitor venues (Encore, Omnia). XS and Zouk emphasizing world-class DJ residencies with production-heavy content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: LIV should test Latin house remix content or tropical/beach-inspired audio bundles in Stories; tap into the palm-tree aesthetic that works for TAO Beach.

content_gaps.description: Limited behind-the-scenes DJ setup/prep content visible in competitor stories. Mostly finished product (performances, crowds).
content_gaps.suggested_action: LIV could differentiate with DJ prep room tours, sound check clips, or talent arrival content—humanizes the experience.

content_gaps.description: Heavy UGC flow from attendees at Encore, OMNIA, and TAO Beach. TikTok hashtags driving discovery for outfit tips and event reviews.
content_gaps.suggested_action: LIV should amplify UGC reposting; create a weekend UGC hashtag challenge or incentivize attendee content via Stories callouts.
